parents.subject: LU-13930 pcc: auto PCC-RO attach in atomic_open

commit.subject: LU-13968 pcc: dont tolerate read errors -EAGAIN/-EIOCBQUEUED
commit.message:
LU-13968 pcc: dont tolerate read errors -EAGAIN/-EIOCBQUEUED

For async I/O engine such as libaio and io_uring, PCC read should
not tolerate -EAGAIN/-EIOCBQUEUED errors, return the error code
to the caller directly.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Idc15ac283a6a7e8dd5dace27323d77d138ec2940
